name: tilt_corpus_wide
description: Wider risk-diverse, tilt-prone cast for the tilt EV corpus (TILT_EV_HARNESS.md part a, breadth): 3 risk-seeking hotheads (spew-divergence candidates) + 3 risk-averse grinders (collapse-divergence candidates), all low-recovery, 6-handed for more bad-beat pressure. Aim: price the collapse/spew tails the 4-persona corpus under-sampled, and reach deeper tilt states (shaken). Tiered no-LLM bots, expression off, psychology on.
